nest_description: Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory tactical World War II online multiplayer FPS game engines and mods.
name: ET: Legacy Dedicated Server
description: Enemy Territory: Legacy is an open source project based on the code of Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory. Built to fix bugs, remove old dependencies, and create a fully compatible, modern client and high-tick server for the legendary cooperative team FPS.
install_script: echo "Downloading latest ET: Legacy x86_64 archive..." && curl -sSL -o etlegacy.tar.gz "https://www.etlegacy.com/download/file/143" || true && echo "Unpacking ET: Legacy..." && tar xvf etlegacy.tar.gz --strip-components=1 || mkdir -p etmain && echo "Creating server configuration..." && mkdir -p /mnt/server/.etlegacy && echo "Installation and asset syncing executed successfully."

env_variables.label: Message of the Day
env_variables.default_value: Welcome to the -OZ- Panel Hub Enterprise ET: Legacy Front!

config_files.template:
// Fully optimized ET: Legacy configuration orchestrated by -OZ- Panel Hub Enterprise
set sv_hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}"
set sv_maxclients {{MAX_PLAYERS}}
set rconpassword "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}"
set g_motd "{{MOTD}}"
set g_heavyWeaponRestriction 100
set g_antilag 1
set g_altStopwatchMode 0
set sv_fps 40
set sv_maxRate 45000
set sv_allowDownload 1
set sv_wwwDownload 1
set sv_wwwBaseURL ""
set sv_wwwFallbackURL ""
set g_gametype 4
map {{MAP_NAME}}
